channel.title: Silver Peak Systems, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Silver Peak Systems, Inc. (silver_peak).

item.title: CVE-2020-12148 · 6.8 MEDIUM — OS Command Injection - nslookup API
item.description: A command injection flaw identified in the nslookup API in Silver Peak Unity ECOSTM (ECOS) appliance software could allow an attacker to execute arbitrary commands with the privileges of the web server running on the EdgeConnect appliance. An attacke…

item.title: CVE-2020-12149 · 6.8 MEDIUM — OS Command Injection - Management File Upload
item.description: The configuration backup/restore function in Silver Peak Unity ECOSTM (ECOS) appliance software was found to directly incorporate the user-controlled config filename in a subsequent shell command, allowing an attacker to manipulate the resulting comm…

item.title: CVE-2020-12146 · 6.6 MEDIUM — Silver Peak Unity OrchestratorTM subject to path traversal.
item.description: In Silver Peak Unity Orchestrator versions prior to 8.9.11+, 8.10.11+, or 9.0.1+, an authenticated user can access, modify, and delete restricted files on the Orchestrator server using the/debugFiles REST API.

item.title: CVE-2020-12147 · 6.6 MEDIUM — Unauthorized queries against the Silver Peak Unity OrchestratorTM MySQL database.
item.description: In Silver Peak Unity Orchestrator versions prior to 8.9.11+, 8.10.11+, or 9.0.1+, an authenticated user can make unauthorized MySQL queries against the Orchestrator database using the /sqlExecution REST API, which had been used for internal testing.

item.title: CVE-2020-12145 · 6.6 MEDIUM — Silver Peak Unity OrchestratorTM authentication can be subverted through manipulation of HTTP headers.
item.description: Silver Peak Unity Orchestrator versions prior to 8.9.11+, 8.10.11+, or 9.0.1+ uses HTTP headers to authenticate REST API calls from localhost. This makes it possible to log in to Orchestrator by introducing an HTTP HOST header set to 127.0.0.1 or loc…

item.title: CVE-2020-12142 · 4.8 MEDIUM — IPSec UDP key material can be retrieved from EdgeConnect by a user with admin credentials
item.description: 1. IPSec UDP key material can be retrieved from machine-to-machine interfaces and human-accessible interfaces by a user with admin credentials. Such a user, with the required system knowledge, could use this material to decrypt in-flight communicatio…

item.title: CVE-2020-12144 · 6 MEDIUM — The certificate used to identify the Silver Peak Cloud Portal to EdgeConnect devices is not validated
item.description: The certificate used to identify the Silver Peak Cloud Portal to EdgeConnect devices is not validated. This makes it possible for someone to establish a TLS connection from EdgeConnect to an untrusted portal.

item.title: CVE-2020-12143 · 6 MEDIUM — The certificate used to identify Orchestrator to EdgeConnect devices is not validated
item.description: The certificate used to identify Orchestrator to EdgeConnect devices is not validated, which makes it possible for someone to establish a TLS connection from EdgeConnect to an untrusted Orchestrator.
